description: Style NoteCreated for the woman of sophistication, this sandal from catwalk is crafted with high quality synthetic leather to offer unparalleled comfort and is uniquely designed to give your feet that urban touche.Heel: 4.5 cmProduct DetailsBronze straps at forefoot and midfoot with toe holdElasticated ankle strapsBrown footbed with embossed brandingTPU outsoleShort heelMaterial and CareWipe with damp cloth to remove dust
